Hello Customer,

thank you again for reporting your findings to us in a responsible way. We really appreciate that.
You can find information about our security process in [https://github.com/company/company/blob/develop/SECURITY.md#rewards](https://github.com/company/company/blob/develop/SECURITY.md#rewards), which outlines that unfortunately Company as an open source software does not have a rewards program. We do credit reporters in acknowledged security issues where advisories are released.

With best regards,

Agent Test
